title: gonolobus uniflorus
intro: Gonolobus uniflorus, also known as the yellow morning-glory or yellow mandevilla, is a flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus uniflorus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
